name: Mom's Green Noodles
recipeInstructions: Cook the noodles; reserve. Melt butter in a large saucepan. In a blender, liquefy 3 to 4 times as much parsley as you'd think you'd need with the least amount of water possible. Add to melted butter with salt, MSG and plenty of black pepper. Add sour cream until it forms a good sauce, about one cup; blend. Do not heat the sour cream too much because it might curdle. Add grated cheese (Parmesan and Romano) and pressed garlic, then noodles.
